semantic_comment: Reads primarily as Cursor because the editor workspace is the main object rather than terminal or autonomous handoff workflow.

visual_evidence: Central assistant robot coordinating between an individual and a small team with shared panels, charts, messages, and task outputs

visual_evidence: Broad orchestration pipeline with search, code, terminal, workflow graph, file/database/package tools, output handoff to human
